case_title: AMERICAN EXPRESS CENTURION BANK VS. EDWIN DASOVICH et al

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JUL-14-2010 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF(S) OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DECLARATION OF NON SERVICE OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT UNABLE TO SERVE EDWIN DASOVICH FILED BY PLAINTIFF AMERICAN EXPRESS CENTURION BANK
